sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Osasuna have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, securing 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, with a strong attacking output in cup games. Athletic Club, however, have struggled, managing only 1 win, 1 draw, and 3 losses, with their defense conceding in most matches. Osasuna's recent home form, including a 3-0 win over Alavés, gives them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Osasuna have remained unbeaten against Athletic Club, with a 1-0 away win and a 0-0 draw. Osasuna also tend to score first in these matchups, as seen in 4 of the last 5 games, which could set the tone for today's clash.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Osasuna (13th, 18 points) and Athletic Club (8th, 23 points) both struggle offensively, with Osasuna scoring 17 and Athletic Club 16 goals this season. Osasuna's aerial strength (3rd in aerial duels won) could exploit Athletic's defensive vulnerabilities, while Athletic's higher possession stats might not translate to goals given their recent finishing woes.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: Osasuna's Raúl García de Haro (5 goals in last 5 matches) and Victor Muñoz (2 goals, 3 assists) are in fine form and could trouble Athletic's backline. For Athletic Club, Iñaki Williams, with a strong head-to-head record (2 goals in last 5 vs Osasuna), remains a threat despite a dip in form.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Osasuna's home advantage, recent form, and unbeaten streak against Athletic Club, they are favored to win. Sofascore's prediction (45% home win, 32% draw, 23% away win) aligns with this view, though a tight, low-scoring game is expected due to both teams' defensive setups and Athletic's struggles to convert chances.
